lookup_rule: For each ticker, look for a registry live_tickers entry; if present, insert Gann Research Zone; otherwise show Gann Pending.
guardrails: Do not treat sample/manual-ready Gann data as live market data.
Do not allow Gann alone to trigger buy/sell.
If hard_missing_data is non-empty, cap action to Watch / Research Only unless other modules confirm.
Verified anchors must replace sample anchors before real trading use.
Every Gann Live page must link back to anchor verification before formal use.
delta_from_v0_3: HOOD moved from Gann Pending to Gann Live
All five sample tickers are now Gann Live
Pending list is empty for the sample set
